heading: Community Assist aims to empower local communities in achieving educational, environmental, and economic sustainability.
body: Established by a collective of Indonesian businesses, we raise funds to support & promote organizations that drive change through education scholarships, youth outreach programs, community building, and sustainable initiatives.
collectiveHeading: Founded in Bali by businesses looking to give back and empower the community.

partners.photoAlt: The Indosole team gathered outside their store in Bali
partners.text: For over 17 years, Indosole has turned discarded tires and river-collected sandals into recycled footwear, pioneering a future-forward model while creating jobs and community across Indonesia.

partners.photoAlt: The seven artists of the PNNY music collective
partners.text: Established in 2014, PNNY is Bali's home-grown collective of seven artists, curating the music events that have helped shape the island's scene, on both a local and international stage.

partners.photoAlt: Ragam Foundation scholarship students and team at a Community Assist event
partners.text: "Ragam" means diversity. The foundation connects people who want to give with communities who need support, and runs the educational scholarship program that every rupiah you give goes toward.
